checks.name: SUBSTANCE FLOOR (RULE -1)
checks.evidence: Every tailored bullet matches canonical concretes. ingenius/odn/vestas verbatim to canonical; nextgen reordered (2,000+ employee experiences led first) with all 4 bullets + all metrics intact; kronos reordered (566% led first) all 4 intact. No metric/clause/bullet dropped.

checks.name: TRUTH / NO-RELABEL (RULE 0)
checks.evidence: ODN framed as OD consulting (leave-cost audit + NGO leadership), not community/ERG. No invented tools beyond canonical skills block. Summary noun swapped to 'People Operations & Employee Experience' (broad umbrella, traces to source). No fabricated numbers. No Kronos '230+/80+/top-3-univ' line present.

checks.name: NO CLICHÉS / NO JD-COPY-PASTE
checks.evidence: Cover uses Jamie's own framing ('first point of contact', 'careful, organized list-checker', 'approach this work like a scientist'); no lifted JD vocabulary or clichés. Summary in her voice.

checks.name: ODN TWO-PROJECTS NOT MIXED
checks.evidence: Bullets 1-2 = leave-cost diagnosis project (300+ cases, $362K); bullet 3 = NGO leadership focus groups/1:1 interviews. No blending across projects.

checks.name: COVER VOICE/FORMAT
checks.evidence: 'Dear Hiring Team,' present; header 'Portland, OR' (Tualatin metro-local, no relocation over-promise, no visa mention); org-psych close present ('My background in organizational psychology means I approach this work like a scientist'); bolds include **Xenium** (company), **2,000+**, **566%**, **$362K** (metrics-with-number-inside), and employer names. Warm human voice.

checks.name: HONEST GAP
checks.evidence: Cover bridges from adjacent EX/customer-service/data work without overclaiming direct PEO benefits-rep tenure; disclose-then-bridge tone, no papering-over.

notes: Summary closing verb-phrase customized to 'make every employee feel supported' (EX-appropriate per §1 flex rule); fixed tail preserved as 'human-centered, data-driven approaches'. Minor: tail says 'data-driven' vs canonical 'evidence-based' — both in Jamie's approved vocabulary, not a violation. Header drops the canonical '(Open to Remote or Relocation)' suffix in favor of clean 'Portland, OR' — acceptable for a metro-local PEO role.
